intent: Implement 8 MemPalace-inspired features into CLEAR Context OS: auto-save hook, precompact hook, session diary, wake-up context, entity registry, conversation mining skill, archive compression, cross-reference discovery

steps.name: Understand Intent
steps.result: 8 features across 3 priority tiers. AGENTING primary (hooks, skills, scripts, registries). Excludes ChromaDB semantic search.

steps.name: Run Discovery
steps.result: 1 agent, 10 skills, 3 hooks, 1 lesson. Overlap with Obsidian PRD identified.

steps.name: Gather Context
steps.result: Storage constraints defined, script-vs-AI boundary established

steps.name: Present Approach
steps.result: User approved approach after storage/script clarification
